permalink: /llms-full.txt
---
# NodeTool Documentation — Full Text

> {{ site.description }}

This file concatenates the NodeTool guide documentation for LLM ingestion. The
full per-node reference (900+ nodes) is omitted for size — browse it at
{{ site.url }}/nodes/ or search at {{ site.url }}/search.json.

{%- assign pages = site.pages | where_exp: "p", "p.url" | sort: "url" -%}
{%- for p in pages -%}
  {%- assign url = p.url -%}
  {%- unless url contains "/nodes/" or url contains ".json" or url contains ".txt" or url contains ".xml" or url contains "404" -%}
    {%- if p.content and p.content != "" -%}

---

# {{ p.title | default: p.name }}

Source: {{ site.url }}{{ url }}

{{ p.content | markdownify | strip_html | strip }}
    {%- endif -%}
  {%- endunless -%}
{%- endfor -%}
